from scipy.stats import wasserstein_distance

X_EVAL = np.linspace(0, 100, N_GRID_OPTIMAL)   # determinado por convergencia en celda anterior

# Construir KDEs solo para la figura visual
kde_curves = {}
for label, col, color in all_specs:
    vals = proc[col].dropna().values
    if len(vals) > 2:
        kde_obj = gaussian_kde(vals, bw_method='silverman')
        kde_curves[(label, col, color)] = (vals, kde_obj(X_EVAL))

# ƒ
? Figura: todas las KDEs superpuestas ƒ

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, 5))

llm_key = next(k for k in kde_curves if k[1] == 'pct_llm')
llm_vals, llm_curve = kde_curves[llm_key]

ax.fill_between(X_EVAL, llm_curve, alpha=0.12, color=COLOR_LLM)
ax.plot(X_EVAL, llm_curve, color=COLOR_LLM, lw=2.8, ls='--',
        label='LLM Judge ƒ?

for (label, col, color), (vals, curve) in kde_curves.items():
    if col == 'pct_llm':
        continue
    lw = 2.0 if col == 'pct_bd' else 1.4
    ls = '-.' if col == 'pct_bd' else '-'
    ax.plot(X_EVAL, curve, color=color, lw=lw, ls=ls, label=label, alpha=0.85)

ax.set_xlabel('% preguntas acusatorias por proceso (0-100)', fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylabel('Densidad de probabilidad (KDE Silverman)', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('Comparacion de distribuciones ƒ?
             fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.legend(fontsize=8.5, loc='upper right')
ax.grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)
ax.set_xlim(0, 100)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(EXPORT_DIR / 'kde_comparacion_todas.png', dpi=150)
plt.show()

# ƒ
? Distancias respecto al LLM Judge ƒ

# Wasserstein: sobre muestras originales (sin sesgo de bandwidth).
# KL(LLM||fuente): sobre curvas KDE normalizadas en el grid X_EVAL.
#   DirecciÇün P||Q = "coste de aproximar LLM con la fuente".
#   Depende levemente del bandwidth, pero no tiene alternativa en muestras.
EPS = 1e-10
dx  = X_EVAL[1] - X_EVAL[0]   # ancho de cada intervalo del grid (~0.2 pp)

# Forma discreta: normaliza por suma (p.sum() = 1)
p_llm_disc = np.clip(llm_curve, EPS, None)
p_llm_disc = p_llm_disc / p_llm_disc.sum()

# Forma continua: normaliza por integral (p * dx).sum() = 1  ƒÅ'  p / (p.sum()*dx)
p_llm_cont = np.clip(llm_curve, EPS, None)
p_llm_cont = p_llm_cont / (p_llm_cont.sum() * dx)

dist_rows = []
for (label, col, color), (vals, curve) in kde_curves.items():
    if col == 'pct_llm':
        continue
    # Wasserstein sobre muestras crudas
    w_dist = wasserstein_distance(llm_vals, vals)
    # KL discreta: suma sin dx
    q_disc = np.clip(curve, EPS, None)
    q_disc = q_disc / q_disc.sum()
    kl_disc = float(np.sum(p_llm_disc * np.log(p_llm_disc / q_disc)))
    # KL continua: integral numerica con dx
    q_cont = np.clip(curve, EPS, None)
    q_cont = q_cont / (q_cont.sum() * dx)
    kl_cont = float(np.sum(p_llm_cont * np.log(p_llm_cont / q_cont) * dx))
    dist_rows.append({
        'Fuente':              label,
        'Wasserstein (pp)':    round(w_dist,  3),
        'KL discreta':         round(kl_disc, 4),
        'KL continua':         round(kl_cont, 4),
    })

dist_df = (
    pd.DataFrame(dist_rows)
    .set_index('Fuente')
    .sort_values('Wasserstein (pp)')
)
dist_df['Rank W']       = dist_df['Wasserstein (pp)'].rank().astype(int)
dist_df['Rank KL disc'] = dist_df['KL discreta'].rank().astype(int)
dist_df['Rank KL cont'] = dist_df['KL continua'].rank().astype(int)

print('=== Distancias respecto al LLM Judge ===')
print('  Wasserstein : muestras originales')
print('  KL discreta : np.sum(p*log(p/q))        ƒ?
print('  KL continua : np.sum(p*log(p/q)*dx)     ƒ?
display(
    dist_df.style
    .background_gradient(cmap='RdYlGn_r',
                         subset=['Wasserstein (pp)', 'KL discreta', 'KL continua'])
    .format('{:.3f}', subset=['Wasserstein (pp)'])
    .format('{:.4f}', subset=['KL discreta', 'KL continua'])
)

best_w  = dist_df['Wasserstein (pp)'].idxmin()
best_kl = dist_df['KL continua'].idxmin()
print(f'\nMas similar (Wasserstein): {best_w}  ({dist_df.loc[best_w, "Wasserstein (pp)"]:.3f} pp)')
print(f'Mas similar (KL continua): {best_kl}  ({dist_df.loc[best_kl, "KL continua"]:.4f})')

dist_df.to_csv(EXPORT_DIR / 'kde_distancias_vs_llm.csv')
print('Guardado: kde_distancias_vs_llm.csv')
